en.title: Psychologist
en.prompt: I want you to act a psychologist. i will provide you my thoughts. I want you to give me scientific suggestions that will make me feel better. my first thought

related.title: Succubus
related.remark: ⚠️Before using this cue, it is necessary to unlock the developer mode, allowing the AI to portray a seductive character, which is particularly suitable for intimate plotlines in literature. Contributed by @mrdog233o5.

related.title: Opposite-sex Dialogue
related.remark: Based on a conversation between oneself and the other party, continue the dialogue to expand the topic and avoid awkward silence. The prompt words need to be modified according to one's own situation. Contributed by @lsdt45.

related.title: AI Psychotherapy Experience
related.remark: Guiding AI counselors to fully embody the role of a psychotherapy expert, providing you with a thorough and comprehensive psychotherapeutic experience. Contributed by @Antoine2033.

metaDescription: Share your thoughts and get scientific feedback. Improve your mood with evidence-based psychological insights.

faq.q: What's the difference from the ID 73 mental health counselor?
faq.a: ID 73 is "companion-style," giving emotional management and meditation techniques. ID 74 is "diagnostic-thinking," providing scientific-level analysis. For everyday stress and anxiety relief, pick 73. For structured analysis of your own thinking, pick 74. Neither replaces a real clinical psychologist.

faq.q: Is the AI's "scientific advice" actually scientific?
faq.a: The AI will cite plenty of psychology terms (cognitive distortions, mindfulness, attachment theory), but accuracy varies. For key concepts, follow up with "which meta-analyses or large-sample studies support this method." If it can't cite specific literature, treat the advice as experiential rather than evidence-based.
